---
title: My Awesome Report
subtitle: With a Really Cool Subtitle
---

```{r}
# Ensure that {gt} tables get rendered correctly
library(gt)
```

## Using {gt} for Tables

{{< include /qmd/_01_tables.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

## Using {ggplot2} for Charts

{{< include /qmd/_02_plots.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

## Using mermaidjs for Diagrams

{{< include /qmd/_03_diagrams.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

## Miscellaneous

This approach also makes use of {targets}, which is courtesy of @landau2021.

::: {#refs}
:::
